title: openai/plugins
summary: Official OpenAI plugins collection providing reference implementations and examples for ChatGPT plugin development. JavaScript-based. 2.9k stars, gained 1,435 stars this week.
chinese_summary: OpenAI 官方插件集合，提供 ChatGPT 插件开发的参考实现和示例代码。基于 JavaScript 实现。2900 星，本周新增 1435 星。
